mapper.select: SELECT id, main_id, expense_id, amount, balance_before, balance_after, item_name, notes FROM pr_transaction_record_sub WHERE main_id = #{mainId} ORDER BY id
mapper.update: UPDATE pr_transaction_record SET status = 1, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{recordId} AND status = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(transaction_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m')
UPDATE pr_transaction_record SET status = 2, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{recordId} AND status = 0
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT e.house_id) AS arrearsHouseCount, COUNT(*) AS arrearsCount, SUM(e.receivable - e.paid_in) AS totalArrears FROM pr_expense e WHERE e.company_id = #{companyId} AND e.org_id = #{orgId} AND e.is_charged = 0 AND e.receivable > 0

SELECT r.id, r.serial_num, r.transaction_type, r.payment_type, r.amount, r.paid_amount, r.status, r.transaction_time, r.operator_id, r.notes, r.invoice_no, b.room_num, u.user_name FROM pr_transaction_record r LEFT JOIN pr_house b ON r.house_id = b.id LEFT JOIN pr_user u ON r.user_id = u.id WHERE r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.org_id = #{orgId} AND DATE(r.transaction_time) = #{date} AND status = 0 ORDER BY r.transaction_time ASC

SELECT d.nick_name AS createBy, r.transaction_time AS createTime, r.paid_amount AS paidIn, u.user_name AS userName, u.phone, h.room_num, h.building_name, r.transaction_type AS tradeSources, h.org_name, IF(ptd.item_group='1','个人账户',ei.item_name) AS itemName, r.serial_num AS billNum FROM pr_transaction_record r LEFT JOIN sys_user d ON r.operator_id = d.id RIGHT JOIN pr_transaction_record_sub ptd ON r.id = ptd.main_id LEFT JOIN pr_house h ON ptd.house_id = h.id LEFT JOIN pr_user_house uh ON h.id = uh.house_id AND uh.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN pr_user u ON uh.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item ei ON ptd.item_code = ei.item_code WHERE r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.del_flag = '0' AND r.status = 0 AND r.transaction_type = 2 AND r.org_id = #{orgId} AND h.building_id = #{buildingId} AND r.transaction_time >= #{startTime} AND r.transaction_time <= #{endTime} AND (h.room_num LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')) ORDER BY r.transaction_time DESC

SELECT ptd.amount AS receivable, r.transaction_time AS createTime, r.serial_num AS billNum, r.payment_type AS paymentMethod1, r.paid_amount AS paymentMoney1, ptd.amount AS qty, ei.item_name AS itemName, r.transaction_type AS tradeSources, h.room_num, h.org_name, h.building_name, u.user_name, r.id AS mainId FROM pr_transaction_record_sub ptd LEFT JOIN pr_transaction_record r ON ptd.main_id = r.id LEFT JOIN pr_house h ON ptd.house_id = h.id LEFT JOIN pr_user_house uh ON h.id = uh.house_id AND uh.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN pr_user u ON uh.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item ei ON ptd.item_code = ei.item_code WHERE ptd.item_group = '5' AND ptd.item_code = '02' AND r.transaction_type = 1 AND r.status = 0 AND r.del_flag = '0' AND r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.org_id = #{orgId} AND h.building_id = #{buildingId} AND r.transaction_time >= #{startTime} AND r.transaction_time <= #{endTime} AND (h.room_num LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')) ORDER BY r.transaction_time DESC

SELECT ptd.amount AS receivable, r.transaction_time AS createTime, r.serial_num AS billNum, r.payment_type AS paymentMethod1, r.paid_amount AS paymentMoney1, ptd.amount AS qty, ei.item_name AS itemName, r.transaction_type AS tradeSources, h.room_num, h.org_name, h.building_name, u.user_name, r.id AS mainId FROM pr_transaction_record_sub ptd LEFT JOIN pr_transaction_record r ON ptd.main_id = r.id LEFT JOIN pr_house h ON ptd.house_id = h.id LEFT JOIN pr_user_house uh ON h.id = uh.house_id AND uh.del_flag = '0' LEFT JOIN pr_user u ON uh.user_id = u.id LEFT JOIN pr_expense_item ei ON ptd.item_code = ei.item_code WHERE ptd.item_group = '5' AND ptd.item_code = '01' AND r.transaction_type = 1 AND r.status = 0 AND r.del_flag = '0' AND r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.org_id = #{orgId} AND h.building_id = #{buildingId} AND r.transaction_time >= #{startTime} AND r.transaction_time <= #{endTime} AND (h.room_num LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%') OR u.phone LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')) ORDER BY r.transaction_time DESC

SELECT e.house_id, h.org_name, h.building_name, h.room_num, MIN(e.start_date) AS startDate, MAX(e.expire_date) AS expireDate, e.item_code, e.item_name, e.standard_price, e.is_free, SUM(e.receivable) AS receivable, SUM(e.preferential) AS preferential, SUM(e.deduction) AS deduction, SUM(e.qty) AS qty FROM pr_expense e LEFT JOIN pr_house h ON e.house_id = h.id WHERE e.company_id = #{companyId} AND e.is_charged = 0 AND e.del_flag = '0' AND e.org_id = #{orgId} AND h.building_id = #{buildingId} AND (h.room_num LIKE CONCAT('%',#{search},'%')) GROUP BY e.house_id, e.item_group, e.item_code, e.is_free ORDER BY h.room_num

SELECT ROUND(SUM(r.paid_amount), 2) AS paidIn FROM pr_transaction_record r WHERE r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.del_flag = '0' AND r.transaction_type = 1 AND r.status = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(r.transaction_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m')

SELECT ptd.item_name AS itemName, SUM(ptd.amount) AS paidIn FROM pr_transaction_record_sub ptd LEFT JOIN pr_transaction_record r ON ptd.main_id = r.id WHERE r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.del_flag = '0' AND r.transaction_type = 1 AND r.status = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(r.transaction_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY ptd.item_name

SELECT r.item_group AS itemGroup, SUM(ptd.amount) AS paidIn, COUNT(1) AS qty FROM pr_transaction_record_sub ptd LEFT JOIN pr_transaction_record r ON ptd.main_id = r.id WHERE r.company_id = #{companyId} AND r.del_flag = '0' AND r.transaction_type = 1 AND r.status = 0 AND DATE_FORMAT(r.transaction_time, '%Y-%m') = DATE_FORMAT(NOW(), '%Y-%m') GROUP BY r.item_group
